name: clawagents
description: Backend agent engine combining openclaw resilience with deepagents reasoning

scripts.test: tsx --test src/corner_cases.test.ts src/tools_comprehensive.test.ts src/interface.test.ts src/gemini_thought_signature.test.ts src/malformed_fn_call.test.ts src/tools/registry.test.ts src/tools/registry.integration.test.ts src/tools/web.test.ts src/tools/ask-user-question.test.ts src/tools/exec-safety-v2.test.ts src/media/images.test.ts src/settings/resolver.test.ts src/testing/mock-provider.test.ts src/tracing/tracing.test.ts src/mcp/mcp.test.ts src/handoffs.test.ts tests/simulated.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:surfaces
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
